testcase.name: LaunchApplication
testcase.error: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Driver must be set at org.openqa.selenium.internal.Require.nonNull(Require.java:63) at org.openqa.selenium.interactions.Actions.<init>(Actions.java:67) at org.openqa.selenium.interactions.Actions.<init>(Actions.java:63) at TestAutomationSuite.AbstractMethods.AbstractMethods.<init>(AbstractMethods.java:29) at TestAutomationSuite.Pageobjects.LoginPage.<init>(LoginPage.java:17) at TestAutomationSuite.BaseObjectDirectory.BaseClass.LaunchApplication(BaseClass.java:87) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:141) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethodConsideringTimeout(MethodInvocationHelper.java:71) at org.testng.internal.invokers.ConfigInvoker.invokeConfigurationMethod(ConfigInvoker.java:400) at org.testng.internal.invokers.ConfigInvoker.invokeConfigurations(ConfigInvoker.java:333) at org.testng.TestRunner.invokeTestConfigurations(TestRunner.java:657) at org.testng.TestRunner.beforeRun(TestRunner.java:646) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:612) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:421) at org.testng.SuiteRunner$SuiteWorker.run(SuiteRunner.java:463) at org.testng.internal.thread.ThreadUtil.lambda$execute$0(ThreadUtil.java:64) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583)
